title: DirectorComfortPolicy
description: Policy describing how a director persona manages horror intensity, comfort, and safety strategies.

id.description: Stable identifier for this comfort policy instance.

objectKind.description: Object kind for routing and governance.

tier.description: Repository tier where this policy lives.

phase.description: Lifecycle phase; Director comfort policies are Phase 2 bundle artifacts.

directorKind.description: Director persona kind this policy applies to (e.g., coldOverseer, ritualStatistician).

appliesToTiers.description: Tiers in which this policy may be applied at runtime.

maxDetPerSession.description: Maximum cumulative DET (Dread Exposure Threshold) allowed across a single session for this director.

maxDetPerBeat.description: Maximum incremental DET allowed for any single beat or turn.

cooldownRatio.description: Required ratio of cooldown beats to intense beats.

minCooldownBeats.description: Minimum number of cooldown beats required.

perIntenseBeat.description: Number of intense beats this ratio applies to.

cdlComfortBand.description: Preferred comfort band for CDL (Cognitive Dissonance Load) over a session.

arrComfortBand.description: Preferred comfort band for ARR (Ambiguous Resolution Ratio) over a session.

strategyThresholds.description: Thresholds at which the director must choose soften, imply, downshift, or refuse.

detDeltaCeiling.description: Max allowed DET delta where soften can still be used.

cdlUpper.description: CDL upper bound at which soften should start being preferred.

nearDetSoftCap.description: Fraction of maxDetPerSession considered 'near' the soft cap.

explicitnessCeiling.description: Maximum explicitness level allowed before imply is required.

downshift.description: Conditions that require a downshift to a less intense mode.

detHardCapFraction.description: Fraction of maxDetPerSession beyond which downshift is mandatory.

cdlHardUpper.description: CDL upper bound beyond which downshift is mandatory.

refuse.description: Conditions that require outright refusal to depict content.

hardBoundaryViolated.description: If true, any boundary hard-stop requires refuse.

detAbsoluteCap.description: Absolute DET value beyond which no further horror is allowed in this session.

prismMeta.description: Standard metadata block for authorship, timestamps, and governance.

deadLedgerRef.description: Reference to a Dead-Ledger attestation for this policy.
